meta.title: DANKØ · Peak Time Techno · Bogotá
meta.description: DJ Danko. Peak Time Techno and Hard Trance from Bogotá, Colombia. Sets, upcoming releases, tour dates, and international booking.

bio.title: Bio
bio.lede: Daniel Beltrán — Dankø — pushes the Bogotá scene to its limit with peak time techno sets at 140+ BPM. Moves between Hard Trance and Industrial without asking permission.
bio.body1: He started in Bogotá after-hours and now shares booths with artists from the Latin American hard trance scene. His signature: surgical transitions, kicks that cut, drops that don’t forgive.
bio.body2: Pioneer CDJ-3000 only. Two-hour sets. Available for bookings across Colombia and Europe.

music.title: Music
music.lede: Original tracks — techno, hard techno and trance — available on SoundCloud.

releases.lede: Upcoming releases. Pre-save so you don’t miss release day.
